zh.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Neville於大約1365年出生在英國越可爾法爾利時，她的父親Sir Robert Neville III44歲，母親Margaret de la Pole40歲。她和John Langton III至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1443年11月24日在英國越可爾德萊斯頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國越可爾利德斯。

zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Neville于大约1365年出生在英国越可爾法爾利时，她的父亲Sir Robert Neville III44岁，母亲Margaret de la Pole40岁。她和John Langton III至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1443年11月24日在英国越可爾德萊斯頓享年79岁，埋葬在英国越可爾利德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Neville was born about 1365, in Farnley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Neville III, was 44 and her mother, Margaret de la Pole, was 40. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with John Langton III. She died on 24 November 1443, in Huddleston, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Neville est née environ 1365, à Farnley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Neville III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Pole, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec John Langton III. Elle est décédée le 24 novembre 1443, à Huddleston, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Neville um 1365 in Farnley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Neville III 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret de la Pole 40. Sie hatte mit John Langton III mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. November 1443 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Huddleston, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Leeds, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Neville è nata il circa 1365 nel Farnley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Neville III, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret de la Pole, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con John Langton III. Morì il 24 novembre 1443, nel Huddleston, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Nevilleが約1365年にイギリスヨークシュアイアファルンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Neville IIIは44歳，母Margaret de la Poleは40歳であった。彼女はJohn Langton IIIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1443年11月24日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハッドレストンで79歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Neville(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 요르크실르 패른리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Neville III(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de la Pole(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 John Langton III(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 11월 24일 영국 요르크실르 허들레스턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Neville III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Pole, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com John Langton III. Ela faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1443, em Huddleston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Neville родилась около 1365 г. в местности фарнли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Neville III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Pole, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от John Langton III. Она умерла 24 ноября 1443 г. в местности худдлестон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Neville nació aproximadamente 1365, en Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Neville III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Pole, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con John Langton III. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1443, en Huddleston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
